title: Thenupuriswarar Temple
tagline: Thenupuriswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thenupuriswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in the village of Patteeswaram, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Thenupuriswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in the village of Patteeswaram, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Thenupuriswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Nyanambikai (Somakamalambigai). The presiding deity is revered in the 7th-century-CE Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Panchavan Madeviyar Pallippadai Temple
topPlaces.description: Panchavan Madeviyar Pallippadai Temple (Panchavanmadeviswaram) is a Pallippadai temple located at Pazhayarai village near Kumbakonam, Thanjavur District, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sakthivanesvara Temple
topPlaces.description: Sakthivanesvara Temple (சக்திவனேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located in a small village called Thirusakthimutram, near another small (but relatively better-known) village, Patteswaram. The nearest urban centre, about seven kilometres (four-and-a-half miles) away, is Kumbakonam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Durgai Amman Temple, Patteeswaram
topPlaces.description: Durgai Amman Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Durga located in Thenupuriswarar Temple, Patteeswaram near Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Patteeswaram
topPlaces.description: Patteeswaram is a village, 8 kilometres (5.0 mi) from Kumbakonam in the state of Tamil Nadu in India. The village was named after Patti (also called Nandini), the calf of Kamadhenu, the divine cow in Hindu mythology.

topPlaces.name: Kalyanasundaresar Temple, Nallur
topPlaces.description: Kalyanasundaresar Temple, Nallur (Tamil: கல்யாணசுந்தரேஸ்வரர் கோயில், நல்லூர்) or Thirunallur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva in Nallur, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 10 km (6.2 mi) away from Kumbakonam, 6 km (3.7 mi) east of Thirukkarugavur, and 30 km (19 mi) south of Thanjavur.

topPlaces.name: Parasunathar Temple, Muzhaiyur
topPlaces.description: Parasunathar Temple (பரசுநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple at Muzhaiyur near Kumbakonam in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Pazhayarai Vadathali
topPlaces.description: Pazhaiyarai vadathali Temple, or Pazhaiyarai Vadathali is a Hindu temple dedicated to Someswarar, a form of Shiva. It is located 6 km from Kumbakonam, Tamilnadu, India, on the Kumbakonam- Aavoor Road, 2 km away from the Thenupuriswarar Temple at Patteeswaram and 3 km from Darasuram.

topPlaces.name: Udaiyalur
topPlaces.description: Udayalur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Udayalur is a few kilometers away from the historic Chola dynasty stronghold town of Kizha Pazhayarai.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Panchavan Madeviyar Pallippadai Temple & around

items.note: Panchavan Madeviyar Pallippadai Temple (Panchavanmadeviswaram) is a Pallippadai temple located at Pazhayarai village near Kumbakonam, Thanjavur District, Tamil Nadu, India.

Sakthivanesvara Temple (சக்திவனேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located in a small village called Thirusakthimutram, near another small (but relatively better-known) village, Patteswaram. The nearest urban centre, about seven kilometres (four-and-a-half miles) away, is Kumbakonam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Durgai Amman Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Durga located in Thenupuriswarar Temple, Patteeswaram near Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India.

Patteeswaram is a village, 8 kilometres (5.0 mi) from Kumbakonam in the state of Tamil Nadu in India. The village was named after Patti (also called Nandini), the calf of Kamadhenu, the divine cow in Hindu mythology.

Kalyanasundaresar Temple, Nallur (Tamil: கல்யாணசுந்தரேஸ்வரர் கோயில், நல்லூர்) or Thirunallur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva in Nallur, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 10 km (6.2 mi) away from Kumbakonam, 6 km (3.7 mi) east of Thirukkarugavur, and 30 km (19 mi) south of Thanjavur.
Parasunathar Temple (பரசுநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple at Muzhaiyur near Kumbakonam in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

Pazhaiyarai vadathali Temple, or Pazhaiyarai Vadathali is a Hindu temple dedicated to Someswarar, a form of Shiva. It is located 6 km from Kumbakonam, Tamilnadu, India, on the Kumbakonam- Aavoor Road, 2 km away from the Thenupuriswarar Temple at Patteeswaram and 3 km from Darasuram.
Udayalur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Udayalur is a few kilometers away from the historic Chola dynasty stronghold town of Kizha Pazhayarai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thenupuriswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thenupuriswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thenupuriswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thenupuriswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thenupuriswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thenupuriswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thenupuriswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thenupuriswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panchavan Madeviyar Pallippadai Temple, Sakthivanesvara Temple, Durgai Amman Temple, Patteeswaram, Patteeswaram, Kalyanasundaresar Temple, Nallur.
